title: Eva Series
wikitext:
"'''Eva Series'''" is a term which in a broad sense, refers to all of the [[Evangelions]].  It is also used more narrowly to refer specifically to the [[Mass Production Evangelions|Mass Production series of Evangelions]], Unit 05 through Unit 13.

[[Category:A to Z]]
[[Category:Disambiguation Pages]]

Article: Eva Series
"Eva Series" is a term which in a broad sense, refers to all of the Evangelions.  It is also used more narrowly to refer specifically to the Mass Production series of Evangelions, Unit 05 through Unit 13.
